characters.description: Biography Al Valancheis one of the newRescue HeroesRecruits introduced in the 2019 reboot ofRescue Heroes. Al's first appearance in the YouTube series was in Episode 13, "Learning to Make Friends". Al has a pet snow leopard namedClaws, who helps Al find stranded skiers on the snowy mountains.

characters.name: Alexa
characters.description:
Alexandria-Rose "Alexa/Rosie" Swift is a sassy, tomboyish, blonde teenage girl. She is sometimes arrogant and boastful, as she had made fun of Kevin for being punished with "Kitchen Duty."
Additionally, she fought with a boy for the chance to be a Space Shuttle Captain. In spite of this, she is willing to put her own desires aside to help others and finally overcame her pride.

characters.name: Alexa
characters.description:

characters.name: Alfredo
characters.description: Alfredois a guest character, but is also the equipment manager and team trainer in theRescue HeroesepisodeThe Chilling Championship. Alfredo is seen at the basketball game helping manage equipment and support the team. He is shown to highly respect Carter McPherson, the team's lead player, for his role in helping them get into the Championship. When the team wins, thanks to Carter, who shoots the winning basket, Alfredo phones Rocky to inform them of his victory. Alfredo and Rocky are seen to have a close relationship. On the bus on the way home, Carter cracks a joke, telling Alfredo that they could not have succeeded in winning the game without his fresh towels, before tossing a towel to the latter. Alfredo remarks, "This is the first thing you passed all night!" causing the team to laugh.

characters.name: Amanda Brittain
characters.description: Amanda Brittainis a famous teenage pop-rock star girl who gets rescued withher fatherafter crash landing in an airplane in the middle of the forest from theRescue HeroesSeason 2 episode,Rock Star On The Rocks. She is a spoof of Brittany Spears and Christina Aguilera, who were popular teenage girl musicians in the late 1990s and early 2000s, around the time Season 2 was in production.

characters.name: Avery Ator
characters.description: Avery AtorSexMaleClosest FriendsNobodyGlovesBrownAbilitiesFlyingAvery AtorisAriel Flyer's rival. He is very vain and thinks he is very clever, which can lead him into trouble. On one occasion he did not follow procedure in an air show and almost caused an accident. He was later arrested byCaptain Cuffsfor reckless endangerment but he swore he was innocent. He is later seen in in the "Think like a Rescue Hero, Think Safe" segment, it is revealed that he put on probation and made to do community service in the form of working for the Rescue Heroes, particularly under Flyer's instructions. He is very vain and thinks he is very clever, which can lead him into trouble. On one occasion he did not follow procedure in an air show and almost caused an accident. He was later arrested byCaptain Cuffsfor reckless endangerment but he swore he was innocent. He is later seen in in the "Think like a Rescue Hero, Think Safe" segment, it is revealed that he put on probation and made to do community service in the form of working for the Rescue Heroes, particularly under Flyer's instructions. Avery Ator and Ariel Flyer are rivals and love to compete against each other.

characters.name: Bill Barker
characters.description: Bill BarkerSexMaleHairGrey Bill Barkeris a Ground Patrol specialist. Bill is a Ground Patrol specialist and K-9 Unit operative. He works for the Rescue Heroes. He has a German Shepard namedBuster.

characters.name: Bill Barker
characters.description: Bill BarkerSexMaleHairGrey Bill Barkeris a Ground Patrol specialist. Bill is a Ground Patrol specialist and K-9 Unit operative. He works for the Rescue Heroes. He has a German Shepard namedBuster.

characters.name: Billy Blazes
characters.description: Billy BlazesTV Series (original)TV Series (reboot)Toy model (original)SexMaleHairDark BrownApparelBlack fireman jacket with yellow stripesClosest FriendsWendy Waters, Rocky Canyon, Jack HammerAnimal PetsSmokeyGlovesRedAbilitiesfirefighter, lead team leader, jet pilotToy No.No. 77081  Billy BlazesWilliam "Billy" Blazesis a firefighter. He is the team leader ofthe Rescue Heroes, second only to M.A.C.C. ChiefWarren Waters, his boss. Blazes holds a prominent role in the team, serving as the shot-caller and  one of the few Team Leaders-- a high-ranking position within the Rescue Heroes unit. Blazes monitors the central computer for any potential safety risk or hazard. Upon an emergency, he decides what units are to be dispatched. He has full authority on the team's initial strategy, resources, and teams to be deployed. In the movie he was poisoned by a unknown poisonous plant. As the most respected member of the team, Billy Blazes enjoys a lot support from his colleagues. Yet his humble attitude allows him to command the team without complaints from the other members. He is known for putting the mission ahead of anything else, even his own personal struggles and weaknesses. Blazes often speaks in code, first rattling out a code number, then a mission name, and a last "Let's go!" to command the team units forward. Billy is also a close friend toWendy Waters. There have been slight hints of romantic interest. Since Wendy is the daughter of Billy's boss, Billy has never dared to risk his position. Billy and Wendy remain close friends. Billy often jokes a lot around her, teasing Wendy about her mission skills. He is good friends withJack Hammer. In several episodes he helps Jack with building projects. As the director of all team dispatch, Billy knows everyone in the Rescue Hero team.  He is a father figure to many in the team, in particular toRocky Canyon. Billy is well-known for his fatherly advice. The Rescue Heroes have given him a few friendly nicknames.Ariel Flyercalls him "Big Guy." Although usually calm, he is known for getting annoyed with specific remarks. He is very apprehensive of celebrities, as seen in "Lights, Camera,...Action." In several episodes, he shows disgust when people or events hinder or delay a mission. Although he has had conflicts with his brother Bobby, they were able to reconcile after Bobby saved Billy's life in "Fire of Field 13."

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: Bobis an old friend ofRocky Canyonfrom theRescue HeroesSeason 1 episode,Twister. He is a show-off, and tends to compete with Rocky in his sports car, while mocking Rocky's custom hot rod that came from his deceased dad. When his car gets destroyed in the tornado, he demands Rocky to pay for it. But in the end, he shows Rocky sympathy for his lost.

characters.name: Bob Buoy
characters.description: Bob BuoySexMale Bob Buoyis a scuba diver. Bob Buoy is a scuba diver and submarine operator who works at theAquatic Rescue Command Center(ARCC) with his partner,Gil Gripper. He is the leader of the ARCC and often acts as the operations supervisor during missions.

characters.name: Bob Sled
characters.description: Bob Sledis an Arctic Rescue specialist and snowmobile operator. He operates a snowmobile like his friend,Al Pinedoes. He rescued seniors from a heavy snowfall in a retirement home.

characters.name: Bobby Blazes
characters.description: Robert "Bobby" BlazesisBilly Blazes' brother. He made his debut inThe Fire of Field 13. InClash Of The Brothers, Bobby argues with Billy sometimes. He later helps Billy and the Rescue Heroes after learning of disasters. He is a firefighter.
